resources.name: Light
resources.plain_description: Protection, clarity, moth food, and gentle beams.
resources.technical_description: Primary starter resource. Produced by Lantern Lily, consumed by Saintmoth, and intended for shield-oriented Bloomchains.

resources.name: Rot
resources.plain_description: Decay, compost, mushrooms, and corpse-fed growth.
resources.technical_description: Corpse/resource loop input. Produced by Gravecap and consumed by Rotling.

resources.name: Blood
resources.plain_description: Risk, hunger, aggression, and rough healing.
resources.technical_description: Danger loop input. Produced by Blood Rose and consumed by Mawlet for repeat triggers.

resources.name: Echo
resources.plain_description: Bells, repeats, memory, and chain wakeups.
resources.technical_description: Chain/meta-resource. Produced by Bellflower and stored by Grave Bell.
